title: scleria rugosa var. onoei
intro: Scleria rugosa var. onoei, also known as Onoe's sedge, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in East Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Scleria rugosa var. onoei are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even exhibit antiviral properties. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
